"'''Utinni'''" was a [[Jawaese]]<ref name="karaoke">[[Leland Chee]]'s karaoke playlist {{C|[[:File:LelandChee-Karaoke-Playlist-LFL.jpg|screenshot]]}}</ref> [[Music|song]] performed by [[The Dusty Jawas]]. It was played by [[DJ (occupation)|DJ]] [[R-3X]] at [[Oga's Cantina]] in [[Black Spire Outpost]].<ref name="R3X's Playlist" />
